name: input
title: Input
description: Text fields with variants, sizes, labels, icons, clear control, numeric stepper, addons, input groups, hover and focus borders, and validation.

api.description: Single-line text field with primary and secondary variants, size, height, padding, and border width control, outside or inside labels, chrome overrides, hover and focus border recipes, icons, clearable trailing control, optional numeric stepper with swappable icons, prefix and suffix addons, an attached action for input groups, and validation state.

props.name: variant
props.description: primary is a surface fill with a hairline border. secondary is a soft secondary wash with secondary-foreground value text and a transparent border.

props.name: size
props.description: Field height step. Maps to --df-control-height-sm through --df-control-height-xl via --df-input-height. Replaces the native HTML size attribute.

props.name: height
props.description: Exact field height. Prefer a control token such as var(--df-control-height-2xl). Sets --df-input-height and overrides size.

props.name: padding
props.description: Padding on all sides. Prefer spacing tokens such as calc(2 * var(--spacing-unit)). Sets each --df-input-padding-* side.

props.name: paddingX
props.description: Horizontal padding. Sets --df-input-padding-left and --df-input-padding-right. Overrides padding on those sides.

props.name: paddingY
props.description: Vertical padding. Sets --df-input-padding-top and --df-input-padding-bottom. Overrides padding on those sides.

props.name: paddingTop
props.description: Top padding. Prefer spacing tokens. Sets --df-input-padding-top and wins over paddingY and padding.

props.name: paddingRight
props.description: Right padding. Prefer spacing tokens. Sets --df-input-padding-right and wins over paddingX and padding.

props.name: paddingBottom
props.description: Bottom padding. Prefer spacing tokens. Sets --df-input-padding-bottom and wins over paddingY and padding.

props.name: paddingLeft
props.description: Left padding. Prefer spacing tokens. Sets --df-input-padding-left and wins over paddingX and padding. Leading icons and floating labels follow this inset.

props.name: label
props.description: Field title. With labelPosition outside, renders the kit Label above the control. With inside, renders a floating label in the field that rises on focus or when the value is filled.

props.name: labelPosition
props.description: outside places the label above the field. inside uses a floating label inside the field chrome. Empty versus filled state is driven by the field value via data-empty.

props.name: labelTrailing
props.description: Meta on the label row. Forwards to Label trailing when outside. Supports Badge or any node.

props.name: labelColor
props.description: Label color. Prefer tokens such as var(--foreground). Sets --df-input-label.

props.name: background
props.description: Field fill. Prefer tokens such as var(--background). Sets --df-input-bg and overrides the variant recipe.

props.name: borderColor
props.description: Field border color. Prefer tokens such as var(--input). Sets --df-input-border.

props.name: borderWidth
props.description: Field border width step. Maps to --border-width-hairline, --border-width-thin, or --border-width-thick via --df-input-border-width.

props.name: hoverBorder
props.description: Instance hover border. Omit to inherit the theme. Set false to keep the resting border. Set true to force the hover border on.

props.name: hoverBorderColor
props.description: Hover border color when hover is active. Prefer tokens such as var(--foreground). Sets --df-input-hover-border. Focus and invalid borders take priority.

props.name: foreground
props.description: Value text color. Prefer tokens such as var(--foreground). Sets --df-input-fg.

props.name: placeholderColor
props.description: Placeholder color. Prefer tokens such as var(--muted-foreground). Sets --df-input-placeholder.

props.name: radius
props.description: Corner radius step. Maps to a --radius-* token via --df-input-radius.

props.name: cornerShape
props.description: Instance corner curve. Omit to inherit --df-corner-shape from the theme (set at create/init).

props.name: focusVariant
props.description: ring uses the focus ring token. border uses a solid focus outline only.

props.name: focusBorderColor
props.description: Focus border color when focusVariant is border. Prefer tokens such as var(--foreground). Sets --df-input-focus-border.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Validation state. Sets aria-invalid and applies the destructive border with --focus-ring-error. Hint text stays muted.

props.name: invalidLabel
props.description: When invalid is true, tint the owned label with the error color. Set false to keep the label at its normal color.

props.name: errorBorderColor
props.description: Invalid border color. Prefer tokens such as var(--destructive). Sets --df-input-error-border.

props.name: errorLabelColor
props.description: Owned label color when invalid and invalidLabel are true. Prefer tokens such as var(--destructive). Sets --df-input-error-label.

props.name: leadingIcon
props.description: Decorative icon at the start of the field.

props.name: trailingIcon
props.description: Icon or control at the end of the text area. Allows interaction for show and hide controls.

props.name: clearable
props.description: Show a clear control on the trailing edge when the field has a value. Hidden while disabled or readOnly.

props.name: onClear
props.description: Called when the clear control is activated.

props.name: prefix
props.description: Static start addon inside the field. Muted and non-editable. Not part of the input value. Use for schemes such as https://.

props.name: suffix
props.description: Static end addon inside the field. Same rules as prefix.

props.name: addonColor
props.description: Prefix and suffix color. Prefer tokens such as var(--muted-foreground). Sets --df-input-addon.

props.name: action
props.description: Attached end action for an input group. Typically a kit Button. Shares the field border with a vertical divider.

props.name: stepper
props.description: Show kit increment and decrement controls when the field is editable. Forces type number, hides the browser spin buttons, and steps with ArrowUp, ArrowDown, and the control buttons. Honors min, max, and step. Hidden when disabled or readOnly.

props.name: incrementIcon
props.description: Icon for the increment control. Defaults to ChevronUp. Only used when stepper is true.

props.name: decrementIcon
props.description: Icon for the decrement control. Defaults to ChevronDown. Only used when stepper is true.

props.name: hint
props.description: Helper line under the field. Wired with aria-describedby. Stays muted in the invalid state.

props.name: hintColor
props.description: Hint color. Prefer tokens such as var(--muted-foreground). Sets --df-input-hint.

props.name: type
props.description: Native input type (text, email, password, and others).

props.name: value / defaultValue
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled field value.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Empty-state hint text in the editable segment.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Non-interactive field. Muted fill, hairline border, and muted value text.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the outermost wrapper when the field is shelled, otherwise on the native input.

props.name: …input attributes
props.description: All native input props (name, required, onChange, and others).

props.name: data-df="input-root"
props.description: Column wrapper when label, hint, or field chrome is present.

props.name: data-df="input-field"
props.description: Relative shell for icons, addons, action, and inside labels. data-empty marks an empty inside-label field.

props.name: data-df="input-label"
props.description: Inside-label title.

props.name: data-df="input-prefix"
props.description: Static start addon.

props.name: data-df="input-suffix"
props.description: Static end addon.

props.name: data-df="input-icon"
props.description: Icon slot. data-side is start or end.

props.name: data-df="input-clear"
props.description: Clear control on the trailing edge when clearable is active and the field has a value.

props.name: data-df="input-stepper"
props.description: Stacked increment and decrement controls when stepper is true.

props.name: data-df="input-stepper-button"
props.description: Stepper button. data-direction is up or down.

props.name: data-df="input-action"
props.description: Attached action for the input group.

props.name: data-df="input-hint"
props.description: Helper line under the field.

props.name: data-df="input"
props.description: Native input element. Also uses class df-input.

props.name: data-border-width
props.description: Border width step on the field shell and native input: hairline, thin, or thick.

props.name: data-hover-border
props.description: true or false when hoverBorder is set. Omit to inherit data-df-hover-border from the host.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --df-input-bg
props.description: Field fill. Set by variant or the background prop.

props.name: --df-input-border
props.description: Field border. Set by variant or the borderColor prop.

props.name: --df-input-border-width
props.description: Resolved field border width from the borderWidth step.

props.name: --border-width-hairline
props.description: Hairline border width step.

props.name: --border-width-thin
props.description: Thin border width step.

props.name: --border-width-thick
props.description: Thick border width step.

props.name: --df-input-fg
props.description: Value text color.

props.name: --df-input-placeholder
props.description: Placeholder color.

props.name: --df-input-autofill-bg
props.description: Browser autofill fill. Applied to the field shell so the wash follows the field radius, including under leading and trailing icons.

props.name: --df-input-autofill-fg
props.description: Browser autofill value text color.

props.name: --df-input-hint
props.description: Hint line color.

props.name: --df-input-label
props.description: Owned label color.

props.name: --df-input-addon
props.description: Prefix and suffix color.

props.name: --df-input-radius
props.description: Resolved corner radius from the radius prop.

props.name: --df-input-height
props.description: Field height from size or height. Defaults to the md control height.

props.name: --df-input-font-size
props.description: Value and placeholder font size. Defaults to --df-text-sm. Size steps override this token.

props.name: --df-input-line-height
props.description: Value and placeholder leading. Paired with the size step as an even pixel value so single-line text centers without sub-pixel drift.

props.name: --df-input-optical-shift
props.description: Upward correction for field text with icons. Applied as twice this value of bottom inset so value ink shares the field midline with prefix, suffix, and icons. Defaults to --df-control-optical-shift.

props.name: --df-input-floating-min-height
props.description: Minimum height when labelPosition is inside so the floating label has room to rise.

props.name: --df-input-padding-top
props.description: Top content padding. Set by padding, paddingY, or paddingTop.

props.name: --df-input-padding-right
props.description: Right content padding. Set by padding, paddingX, or paddingRight.

props.name: --df-input-padding-bottom
props.description: Bottom content padding. Set by padding, paddingY, or paddingBottom.

props.name: --df-input-padding-left
props.description: Left content padding. Set by padding, paddingX, or paddingLeft. Icons and floating labels follow this inset.

props.name: --df-hover-border
props.description: Theme field hover border. on paints the ink hover border; off keeps the resting border. Runtime gating uses data-df-hover-border on html. Set with df-ui init --hover-border. Default on.

props.name: --df-input-hover-border
props.description: Hover border when the theme or instance enables hover. Defaults to the ink foreground. Override with hoverBorderColor.

props.name: --df-input-focus-border
props.description: Solid focus border when focusVariant is border.

props.name: --df-input-error-border
props.description: Invalid border color.

props.name: --df-input-error-label
props.description: Owned label color when invalidLabel is active.

props.name: --input
props.description: Default border token.

props.name: --ring
props.description: Ring focus border color.

props.name: --focus-ring
props.description: Ring focus glow.

props.name: --focus-ring-error
props.description: Invalid glow.

props.name: --destructive
props.description: Invalid label and default error border.

props.name: --background
props.description: Primary fill default.

props.name: --secondary
props.description: Secondary variant wash source.

props.name: --secondary-foreground
props.description: Secondary variant value text.

props.name: --muted
props.description: Disabled fill default.

props.name: --muted-foreground
props.description: Disabled value text.

props.name: --foreground
props.description: Default text color.

props.name: --df-corner-shape
props.description: Theme corner curve for all kit chrome. round = circular arcs; smooth = continuous squircle. Set with df-ui init --corner-shape, or override on :root. Default round.
